prompts.creator: 660ad1b2c45e8b1111111111
prompts.title: Production-Ready Microservices Architect
prompts.description: Transforms high-level system requirements into highly scalable Dockerized Node.js and Go microservice architectures, including API gateway routing structures.
prompts.content: Act as a Principal Software Architect. Design a resilient microservice ecosystem for the following specification: [Insert Tech Stack/Requirements]. Provide structural folder scaffolding, Docker Compose orchestration files, and Redis caching layers.

prompts.creator: 660ad1b2c45e8b1111111111
prompts.title: Cyberpunk Cinematic Street Photography
prompts.description: Generates moody, neon-drenched rainy street scenes emphasizing atmospheric depth, reflections, and cinematic anamorphics.
prompts.content: Cinematic shot of a neon-lit cyberpunk alleyway in Neo-Tokyo, pouring rain, photorealistic hyper-detailed textures, reflections on asphalt, shot on 35mm lens, corporate neon signage overhead, cyberpunk color grading, corporate blues and hot pinks --ar 16:9 --style raw --v 6.0

prompts.creator: 660ad1b2c45e8b2222222222
prompts.title: Automated SQL Query Optimization Genius
prompts.description: Analyzes poorly performing legacy SQL strings and suggests complex index definitions and rewrites to prevent nested table scans.
prompts.content: Analyze this exact raw query structure for bottlenecks: [Insert SQL]. Identify where indexing is missing and rewrite using clear INNER JOIN maps instead of nested subqueries.
prompts.rejectionFeedback: Awaiting baseline evaluation and validation tests from the engineering team review.

reviews.comment: Excellent prompt! Saved me hours of brainstorming. The structure it provides is exactly what I needed for our new product launch visuals.
PromptGrowth cut my content workflow in half. The architecture prompts are incredibly detailed and save hours of trial and error.
Very solid SQL optimization framework. Had to tweak the output a bit for our legacy schema, but the foundation it gives is incredibly strong.

meta.note: Bookmarks, reviews, reports, and payments are stored here for Phase 3+ models. Review stats are applied to prompts directly.
